Name: Average Pageviews
Description: The average number of pages a contact sees. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: First Referring Site
Description: The first website that referred a contact to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.
Usages: Inbounddb lists (2); Automation platform flow (28); Sales view (4)

Name: Time First Seen
Description: The first time a contact has been seen. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: First Touch Converting Campaign
Description: The campaign responsible for the first touch creation of this contact

Name: First Page Seen
Description: The first page a contact saw on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Time of First Session
Description: The first time a contact visited your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Last Referring Site
Description: The last website that referred a contact to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Time Last Seen
Description: The last time and date a contact has viewed a page on your website.

Name: Last Touch Converting Campaign
Description: The campaign responsible for the last touch creation of this contact

Name: Last Page Seen
Description: The last page a contact saw on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Time of Last Session
Description: The last time and date a contact visited your website.

Name: Number of event completions
Description: The sum of all events a contact has experienced. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Number of Pageviews
Description: The sum of all pages a contact has seen on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Number of Sessions
Description: The sum of all sessions a contact has made to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

Name: Event Revenue
Description: Event revenue can be set on a contact though HubSpot's enterprise Events. http://help.hubspot.com/articles/KCS_Article/Reports/How-do-I-create-Events-in-HubSpot

Name: Original Source
Description: First known source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically, but may be updated manually.
Options: Organic Search (ORGANIC_SEARCH); Paid Search (PAID_SEARCH); Email Marketing (EMAIL_MARKETING); Organic Social (SOCIAL_MEDIA); Referrals (REFERRALS); Other Campaigns (OTHER_CAMPAIGNS); Direct Traffic (DIRECT_TRAFFIC); Offline Sources (OFFLINE); Paid Social (PAID_SOCIAL); AI Referrals (AI_REFERRALS)
Usages: Inbounddb lists (1); Automation platform flow (19); Report (2); Sales view (8)

Name: Original Source Drill-Down 1
Description: Additional information about the source through which a contact first found your website. This property is automatically set by HubSpot.
Usages: Inbounddb lists (2); Automation platform flow (19); Sales view (9)

Name: Original Source Drill-Down 2
Description: Additional information about the source through which a contact first found your website. This property is automatically set by HubSpot.
Usages: Inbounddb lists (3); Automation platform flow (16); Sales view (9)

Name: Latest Traffic Source
Description: The source of the latest session for a contact
Options: Organic Search (ORGANIC_SEARCH); Paid Search (PAID_SEARCH); Email Marketing (EMAIL_MARKETING); Organic Social (SOCIAL_MEDIA); Referrals (REFERRALS); Other Campaigns (OTHER_CAMPAIGNS); Direct Traffic (DIRECT_TRAFFIC); Offline Sources (OFFLINE); Paid Social (PAID_SOCIAL); AI Referrals (AI_REFERRALS)

Name: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 1
Description: Additional information about the latest source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

Name: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 2
Description: Additional information about the source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

Name: Latest Traffic Source Date
Description: The time of the latest session for a contact

Name: Street Address
Description: A contact's street address, including apartment or unit #

Name: Agree to terms
Description: I agree to the terms and conditions of the services agreement.

Name: Alternative Email
Description: Other Email

Name: Annual Revenue
Description: Annual company revenue

Name: Business Legal Name
Description: Legal name of business

Name: Buying Timeline
Description: Indicates the expected buying timeline or urgency for this contact, helping the sales team prioritize leads and forecast deal closure timing based on need.
Options: Immediate Need - Within 30 Days (immediate_need__within_30_days); Emergency Replacement - ASAP (emergency_replacement__asap); Short Term - 1-3 Months (short_term__13_months); Medium Term - 3-6 Months (medium_term__36_months); Long Term - 6-12 Months (long_term__612_months); Future Planning - 12+ Months (future_planning__12_months); Evaluating Options - No Set Timeline (evaluating_options__no_set_timeline)

Name: City
Description: A contact's city of residence

Name: Close Date
Description: The date that a contact became a customer. This property is set automatically by HubSpot when a deal or opportunity is marked as closed-won. It can also be set manually or programmatically.

Name: Company Name
Description: The name of the contact's company. This is separate from the Name property of the contact's associated company and can be set independently.
Usages: Form (18); Inbounddb lists (1); Automation platform flow (2); Object requirement (1); Email (2); Layout (1); Sales view (16)

Name: Company size
Description: A contact's company size. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

Name: Competitor Products
Description: Tracks which competitor platforms or solutions a prospect is currently using or considering, enabling the sales team to assess the competitive landscape and tailor messaging for AuctionMethod's unique advantages.
Options: LiveAuctioneers (liveauctioneers); Invaluable (invaluable); Hibid (hibid); BidSpotter (bidspotter); Proxibid (proxibid); AuctionTime (auctiontime); K-BID (kbid); BidCorp (bidcorp); EstateSales.NET (estatesalesnet); AuctionZip (auctionzip); AuctionFlex (auctionflex); MaxaNet (maxanet); Bidsquare (bidsquare); Facebook (facebook); Existing AuctionMethod Site (existing_auctionmethod_site); Legacy/Custom In-House System (legacycustom_inhouse_system); Traditional In-Person Only (traditional_inperson_only); Currently Evaluating Multiple Options (currently_evaluating_multiple_options)

Name: Country/Region
Description: The contact's country/region of residence. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

Name: Create Date
Description: The date that a contact entered the system
Usages: Inbounddb lists (1); Automation platform flow (1); Report (25); Sales view (14)

Name: Date of birth
Description: A contact's date of birth. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

Name: Days To Close
Description: The days that elapsed from when a contact was created until they closed as a customer. This is set automatically by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

Name: Degree
Description: A contact's degree. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced to via Lead Ads tool

Name: Email
Description: A contact's email address
Usages: Form (163); Inbounddb lists (3); Bot (4); Automation platform flow (7); Object requirement (1); Email (5); Report (2); Data sync mapping (1); Sales view (20); Properties v3 card (1)

Name: Date of last meeting booked in meetings tool
Description: The date of the last meeting that has been scheduled by a contact through the meetings tool. If multiple meetings have been scheduled, the date of the last chronological meeting in the timeline is shown.
Usages: Inbounddb lists (1); Automation platform flow (5); Report (1); Sales view (3)

Name: Campaign of last booking in meetings tool
Description: This UTM parameter shows which marketing campaign (e.g. a specific email) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

Name: Medium of last booking in meetings tool
Description: This UTM parameter shows which channel (e.g. email) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

Name: Source of last booking in meetings tool
Description: This UTM parameter shows which site (e.g. Twitter) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

Name: Est. Monthly Sales
Description: What is your estimated monthly sales volume?

Name: Facebook Personal Profile
Description: Your personal profile on Facebook

Name: Fax Number
Description: A contact's primary fax number

Name: Field of study
Description: A contact's field of study. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

Name: First Comment
Description: This is the first comment submitted via the contact form in HubSpot.

Name: First Deal Created Date
Description: The date the first deal for a contact was created. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

Name: First Name
Description: A contact's first name
Usages: Form (90); Bot (4); Automation platform flow (7); Object requirement (1); Email (53); Layout (19); Sales view (9); Properties v3 card (1)

Name: Graduation date
Description: A contact's graduation date. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

Name: Hosted Site
Description: The domain name pointing to the AuctionMethod installation

Name: Buying Role
Description: The role that a contact plays during the sales process. Contacts can have more than one role, and they can share the same role with another contact.
Options: Blocker (BLOCKER) [READ-ONLY]; Budget Holder (BUDGET_HOLDER) [READ-ONLY]; Champion (CHAMPION) [READ-ONLY]; Decision Maker (DECISION_MAKER) [READ-ONLY]; End User (END_USER) [READ-ONLY]; Executive Sponsor (EXECUTIVE_SPONSOR) [READ-ONLY]; Influencer (INFLUENCER) [READ-ONLY]; Legal & Compliance (LEGAL_AND_COMPLIANCE) [READ-ONLY]; Other (OTHER) [READ-ONLY]

Name: Chat Assistant IQL Date
Description: Date that an automated chat assistant IQL was triggered based on chat intent

Name: Chat Assistant Source
Description: Which chat assistant the QL is being generated from

Name: Chat Assistant:Summary
Description: AI-generated rich summary of a chat conversation when a customer expresses buying intent or requests to speak with Sales. Used to populate the Support Assistant QL card in the BDR prospecting workspace. This is populated by our HighIntentQlTool.

Name: Enrichment opt out timestamp
Description: Timestamp of when the contact opted out of being included in the HubSpot Enrichment database

Name: Member email
Description: Email used to send private content information to members

Name: Email Confirmed
Description: Email Confirmation status of user of Content Membership

Name: Time enrolled in registration follow up emails
Description: The time when the contact was first enrolled in the registration follow up email flow

Name: Membership Notes
Description: The notes relating to the contact's content membership.

Name: Registered At
Description: Datetime at which this user was set up for Content Membership

Name: Domain to which registration email was sent
Description: Domain to which the registration invitation email for Content Membership was sent to

Name: Time registration email was sent
Description: Datetime at which this user was sent a registration invitation email for Content Membership

Name: Status
Description: The status of the contact's content membership.

Name: Country/Region Code
Description: The contact's two-letter country code.

Name: Created by user ID
Description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Currently Enrolled in Prospecting Agent
Description: Indicates whether or not the contact has an active prospecting agent enrollment

Name: Email Domain
Description: A contact's email address domain

Name: ID of first engagement
Description: The object id of the current contact owner's first engagement with the contact.

Name: Persona
Description: A contact's persona
Options: Companies that specialize in selling sports memorabilia and other types of collectables. (persona_7); Organizations that just need to run one or several auction events. They have no longterm intentions. (persona_8); Large corporations that want to utilize competitive bidding technology. The main corporation is not in the auction business. (persona_9); Government agencies and contractors. (persona_10); Car dealers and others who specialize in vehicle auctions and nothing else. (persona_11); Companies like Maxsold and The Difference that specialize in selling personal belongings. (persona_6); These guys sell all the tools, machinery, and equipment that powers manufacturing and industry. Go-Dove.com is a good example. (persona_5); Companies like Ritchie Brothers and Iron Planet sell heavy equipment like dozers, excavators, tractors, combines, generators, things like that. (persona_4); Companies like West Auctions that sell anything and everything under the sun, typically private property although some like Larry Sims will sometimes focus on one thing like real estate while being willing to liquidate estates and businesses as well. (persona_3); Companies that focus almost exclusively on real estate, like Hilco and AW Properties. Can be farmland, residential or commercial real estate - all types. (persona_2); Companies like BIDRL, Nellis Auctions, and Auction Nation that liquidate retail merchandise (closeouts, returns, overstock, etc.). (persona_1); A unique use case, where someone is using this for non-traditional asset sales. (persona_12)

Name: Likelihood to close

Description: Link to an RSS feed for your auction announcements.

Name: Twitter Username 2
Description: Other Twitter Username

Name: Twitter Bio
Description: The contact's Twitter bio. This is set by HubSpot using the contact's email address.

Name: Twitter Profile Photo
Description: The contact's Twitter profile photo. This is set by HubSpot using the contact's email address.

Name: Average Zoom webinar attendance duration
Description: The average amount of time this contact attends your Zoom webinars. 100% would mean the contact stays until the end of each Zoom webinar they attend.

Name: Total number of Zoom webinars attended
Description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has attended.

Name: Last registered Zoom webinar
Description: The name of the last Zoom webinar this contact registered for. This property is updated every time they register for a new Zoom webinar.

Name: Total number of Zoom webinar registrations
Description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has registered for.
